blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
